subject: feat(icons): unify all app icons with header four-squares design
body:
All icons now reflect the AppHeader brand icon — four white squares with
opacity gradient on brand-blue background. Added Sharp-based icon generation
pipeline per glow-props spec: single SVG source at 400 DPI, outputs all
needed PNG sizes plus favicon.svg.

Tags: ui, pwa, branding

Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
